mapper.sql: select d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.ancestors, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, d.status, d.del_flag, d.province_code, d.province_name, d.city_code, d.city_name, d.district_code, d.district_name, d.street_code, d.street_name, d.detail_address, d.longitude, d.latitude, d.dept_type, d.create_by, d.create_time from sys_dept d
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user where dept_id = #{deptId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from sys_dept where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{deptId} limit 1
select * from sys_dept where find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors)
select count(*) from sys_dept where status = 0 and del_flag = '0' and find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors)
where dept_name=#{deptName} and parent_id = #{parentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dept( dept_id, parent_id, dept_name, ancestors, order_num, leader, phone, email, status, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, street_code, street_name, detail_address, longitude, latitude, dept_type, create_by, create_time )values( #{deptId}, #{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{ancestors}, #{orderNum}, #{leader}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{provinceCode}, #{provinceName}, #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, #{districtCode}, #{districtName}, #{streetCode}, #{streetName}, #{detailAddress}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{deptType}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update sys_dept set status = '0' where dept_id in
#{deptId}
update sys_dept set order_num = #{orderNum} where dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.delete: update sys_dept set del_flag = '2' where dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.select: select dept_id, dept_name, parent_id, longitude, latitude, province_code, city_code, district_code, street_code, province_name, city_name, district_name, street_name, detail_address from sys_dept where del_flag = '0' and dept_type = '1' and longitude is not null and latitude is not null

select dept_id, dept_name, parent_id, longitude, latitude, province_code, city_code, district_code, street_code from sys_dept where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = 0 and longitude is not null and latitude is not null
